hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Work through each shape in order - sky, grass, house frame, roof, windows, door, knob

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The canvas coordinates go from (0,0) at top-left to (100,100) at bottom-right

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For the roof triangle: the left point is at x=16 (house at 20 minus 4 overhang), the right at x=84

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The windows sit 5 down from the top of the house frame (y=55), and 10 in from the edges

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The door is centered horizontally: house starts at x=20, is 60 wide, door is 14 wide, so door x = 20 + (60-14)/2 = 43
